texto: Am I not fit to this world or people around of me not fit for me, arguable...without proper answer. Everyone had their logic, explanations, clarifications, examples but here also not solution. But the person himself/herself at least can figure out what's right and what's wrong. Then also there is no solution until he or she admitted that he or she is wrong. Admitting own mistake is hard to find because of so called pride. It's life you have to face everything here without solution, and the last thought is, all the problems solution will be after death only. It's the fact of the life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nutan Bajracharya sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Am I not fit to this world or people around of me not fit for me, arguable...without proper answe…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, death, faith, útil em momentos de luto e estudos.
